entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop produced in semi-arid tropics.

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A major biotic constraint disease affecting pearl millet.

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The pathogen that causes downy mildew in pearl millet.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The geographical region where pearl millet production is affected by downy mildew.

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand or fight off downy mildew.

entities.name: RESISTANCE BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing crop varieties that are resistant to diseases.

entities.name: SCREENING
entities.description: The process of testing parental lines against pathogen isolates to identify resistance.

entities.name: GREENHOUSE CONDITIONS
entities.description: The controlled environment where the screening of parental lines was conducted.

entities.name: GUJARAT
entities.description: An Indian state from which the pathogen isolate SG445 was sourced.

entities.name: HARYANA
entities.description: An Indian state from which the pathogen isolate SG519 was sourced.

entities.name: RAJASTHAN
entities.description: An Indian state from which the pathogen isolate SG526 was sourced.

entities.name: SG445
entities.description: An indigenous pathogen isolate of Sclerospora graminicola from Gujarat.

entities.name: SG519
entities.description: An indigenous pathogen isolate of Sclerospora graminicola from Haryana.

entities.name: SG526
entities.description: An indigenous pathogen isolate of Sclerospora graminicola from Rajasthan.

entities.name: ICMP 85410-P7
entities.description: A pearl millet parental line found to be highly susceptible to downy mildew.
